evidence_snippet: Theomore's daughter «Mara» served as a companion to Queen «Alysanne Targaryen» at «Dragonstone» in «55 AC». Lord Manderly lavishly entertained Alysanne when the queen visited «White Harbor» in «58 AC» during a «royal progress».

In «58 AC» Lord Manderly attended a tourney in the capital to celebrate the tenth anniversary of Jaehaerys's coronation. One of Theomore's daughters «married» Lord «Darklyn» at «Duskendale» in «72 AC».
